contents:
[package]
name = "fischl"
description = "Helper library to manage compatibility and downloads for KeqingLauncher"
authors = ["TukanDev"]
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"

[build-dependencies]
prost-build = "0.14.3"
protoc-bin-vendored = "3"

[dependencies]
reqwest-middleware = "0.5.1"
reqwest-retry = "0.9.1"
sysinfo = "0.37.2"
serde_json = "1.0.149"
thiserror = "1.0"
futures-util = "0.3.32"

[dependencies.serde]
version = "1"
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.13.3"
features = ["blocking", "json", "stream", "native-tls-vendored", "__tls"]

[dependencies.md-5]
version = "0.11.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.sha2]
version = "0.11.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.prost]
version = "0.14.3"
features = []
optional = true

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.52"
features = ["macros", "fs", "io-util", "time", "sync"]

[dependencies.zip]
version = "8.6.0"
default-features = false
features = ["deflate", "zstd", "lzma", "xz", "aes-crypto"]
optional = true

[dependencies.tar]
version = "0.4.44"
optional = true

[dependencies.flate2]
version = "1.1.9"
default-features = false
features = ["zlib-rs"]
optional = true

[dependencies.liblzma]
version = "0.4.6"
features = ["static"]
optional = true

[dependencies.zstd]
version = "0.13.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.zesven]
git = "https://github.com/TukanDev/zesven.git"
branch = "main"
features = ["zstd", "lz4", "brotli"]
optional = true

[dependencies.crossbeam-deque]
version = "0.8.6"
optional = true

[dependencies.hdiffpatch-rs]
git = "https://github.com/TwintailTeam/hdiffpatch-rs.git"
branch = "master"

[features]
compat = ["dep:sha2"]
download = ["dep:zip", "dep:tar", "dep:flate2", "dep:liblzma", "dep:zstd", "dep:zesven", "dep:md-5", "dep:prost", "dep:crossbeam-deque"]
default = ["download"]

[package]
name = "hdiffpatch-rs"
description = "Rust implementation of HDiffPatch with bit of extra sauce"
authors = ["TukanDev"]
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2024"

[dependencies]
zstd = "0.13.3"

[package]
name = "rpcdiscord"
version = "0.2.6"
authors = ["smokingplaya", "Violet <110789901+vionya@users.noreply.github.com>"]
edition = "2018"
description = "A simple, cross-platform crate for interfacing with Discord's IPC"
readme = "README.md"
repository = "https://github.com/smokingplaya/rpcdiscord"
license = "MIT"
keywords = ["discord", "rich-presence", "ipc"]
documentation = "https://docs.rs/rpcdiscord"

[dependencies]
serde_json = "1.0"
serde = "1.0"
serde_repr = "0.1"
serde_derive = "1.0"

[dependencies.uuid]
version = "0.8"
features = ["v4"]

[package]
name = "zesven"
version = "1.1.0"
authors = ["Andrey Akinshin <andrey.akinshin@gmail.com>"]
edition = "2024"
rust-version = "1.85"
description = "A pure Rust implementation of the 7z archive format"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
keywords = ["7z", "archive", "compression", "lzma", "7zip"]
categories = ["compression", "encoding"]
repository = "https://github.com/AndreyAkinshin/zesven"
readme = "../README.md"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
all-features = true
rustdoc-args = ["--cfg", "docsrs"]

[features]
default = ["lzma", "lzma2", "deflate", "bzip2", "ppmd", "aes", "parallel"]
lzma = ["dep:lzma-rust2"]
lzma2 = ["lzma"]
deflate = ["dep:flate2"]
bzip2 = ["dep:bzip2"]
ppmd = ["dep:ppmd-rust"]
lz4 = ["dep:lz4_flex"]
zstd = ["dep:zstd"]
brotli = ["dep:brotli"]
aes = ["dep:aes", "dep:cbc", "dep:sha2", "dep:zeroize"]
parallel = ["dep:rayon"]
fast-lzma2 = ["lzma"]
regex = ["dep:regex"]
sysinfo = ["dep:sysinfo"]
cli = ["dep:clap", "dep:clap_complete", "dep:indicatif", "dep:rpassword", "dep:glob", "dep:serde_json", "dep:console", "dep:dialoguer", "dep:ctrlc", "dep:walkdir"]
async = ["dep:tokio", "dep:tokio-util", "dep:async-compression", "dep:pin-project-lite", "dep:futures"]
wasm = ["dep:wasm-bindgen", "dep:wasm-bindgen-futures", "dep:js-sys", "dep:web-sys", "getrandom/js"]
wasm-default = ["lzma", "lzma2", "deflate", "bzip2", "ppmd", "aes", "wasm"]

[dependencies]
crc32fast = "1"
crc64fast = "1"
thiserror = "2"
log = "0.4"
filetime = "0.2"

[dependencies.lzma-rust2]
version = "=0.15.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.flate2]
version = "1"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["zlib-rs"]

[dependencies.bzip2]
version = "0.6"
optional = true

[dependencies.ppmd-rust]
version = "1"
optional = true

[dependencies.lz4_flex]
version = "0.11"
optional = true

[dependencies.zstd]
version = "0.13"
optional = true

[dependencies.brotli]
version = "6"
optional = true

[dependencies.aes]
version = "0.8"
optional = true

[dependencies.cbc]
version = "0.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.sha2]
version = "0.10"
optional = true

[dependencies.zeroize]
version = "1"
optional = true

[dependencies.rayon]
version = "1.10"
optional = true

[dependencies.regex]
version = "1"
optional = true

[dependencies.sysinfo]
version = "0.32"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["system"]

[dependencies.clap]
version = "4.5"
features = ["derive", "env", "wrap_help", "string"]
optional = true

[dependencies.clap_complete]
version = "4.5"
optional = true

[dependencies.indicatif]
version = "0.17"
optional = true

[dependencies.rpassword]
version = "7.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.glob]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.serde_json]
version = "1.0"
optional = true

[dependencies.console]
version = "0.15"
optional = true

[dependencies.dialoguer]
version = "0.11"
optional = true

[dependencies.ctrlc]
version = "3.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.walkdir]
version = "2.5"
optional = true

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.43"
features = ["fs", "io-util", "sync", "rt", "macros", "time", "rt-multi-thread"]
optional = true

[dependencies.tokio-util]
version = "0.7"
features = ["io", "compat"]
optional = true

[dependencies.async-compression]
version = "0.4"
features = ["tokio", "lzma", "deflate", "bzip2"]
optional = true

[dependencies.pin-project-lite]
version = "0.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.futures]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.wasm-bindgen]
version = "0.2"
optional = true

[dependencies.wasm-bindgen-futures]
version = "0.4"
optional = true

[dependencies.js-sys]
version = "0.3"
optional = true

[dependencies.web-sys]
version = "0.3.70"
features = ["File", "Blob", "FileReader", "ReadableStream", "WritableStream", "ReadableStreamDefaultReader", "ReadableStreamDefaultController", "WritableStreamDefaultWriter", "Window", "console"]
optional = true

[dependencies.getrandom]
version = "0.2"
optional = true

[dev-dependencies]
tempfile = "3"
proptest = "1"
rand = "0.8"
wasm-bindgen-test = "0.3"

[lib]
crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies]

[[bin]]
name = "zesven"
path = "src/bin/cli/main.rs"
required-features = ["cli"]

[source.vendored-sources]
directory = "cargo/vendor"

[source.crates-io]
replace-with = "vendored-sources"

[source."https://github.com/twintailteam/fischl-rs"]
git = "https://github.com/twintailteam/fischl-rs"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
branch = "master"

[source."https://github.com/twintailteam/hdiffpatch-rs"]
git = "https://github.com/twintailteam/hdiffpatch-rs"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
branch = "master"

[source."https://github.com/tukandev/rpcdiscord"]
git = "https://github.com/tukandev/rpcdiscord"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
branch = "main"

[source."https://github.com/tukandev/zesven"]
git = "https://github.com/tukandev/zesven"
replace-with = "vendored-sources"
branch = "main"
